groups.title: Inflation
groups.blurb: Three ways the U.S. measures inflation — consumer prices (CPI), producer prices (PPI), and the PCE deflator.

indicators.title: US Consumer Price Index
indicators.subtitle: Headline and core CPI, components, and energy prices — sourced live from the U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics.
indicators.card: Headline & core CPI, monthly change, components, energy prices. Source: BLS.

indicators.title: US Producer Price Index
indicators.subtitle: Final-demand prices producers receive — headline, core, goods, services, foods, energy. Source: BLS.
indicators.card: Final-demand prices producers receive — headline, core, goods, services. Source: BLS.

indicators.title: PCE Price Index
indicators.subtitle: The Fed's preferred inflation gauge — headline, core, services, and supercore. Source: BEA.
indicators.card: The Fed's preferred gauge — headline, core, services, supercore. Source: BEA.

indicators.title: US Labor Market
indicators.subtitle: Payrolls, unemployment, wages, hours, participation, and JOLTS — sourced live from the U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics.
indicators.card: Payrolls, unemployment, JOLTS, wage growth, participation.

groups.title: Housing
groups.blurb: Sales, permits & starts, prices, mortgage activity.

indicators.title: US Existing Home Market
indicators.subtitle: Existing home sales, median price, inventory, Case-Shiller HPI, and the 30-year mortgage rate — sourced live from FRED.
indicators.card: Existing home sales, median price, inventory, Case-Shiller HPI, mortgage rate. Source: FRED.

indicators.title: US New Home Market
indicators.subtitle: New home sales, prices, inventory by stage of construction, months supply, regional sales, and the NAHB Housing Market Index — sourced live from the US Census Bureau, FRED, and NAHB.
indicators.card: New home sales, median & average price, inventory, regional sales, NAHB sentiment. Source: Census, FRED, NAHB.

indicators.title: US Building Permits & Housing Starts
indicators.subtitle: Permits authorized and units started — total, single-family, and multi-family (with the 2-4 and 5+ unit breakdown). Sourced live from the US Census Bureau via FRED; SAAR.
indicators.card: Permits & starts — total, single-family, multi-family, MoM by type, permits-to-starts ratio. Source: Census/FRED.

indicators.title: US Mortgage Activity
indicators.subtitle: Application volume, rates & spreads, the “golden handcuff,” and stress indicators — sourced live from the MBA, Freddie Mac, the Federal Reserve, and BEA.
indicators.card: MBA applications, 30Y/15Y rates, spread, the golden handcuff, delinquency, debt, affordability. Source: MBA, Freddie Mac, Fed, BEA.

groups.title: GDP
groups.blurb: Real GDP, contributions, profits, productivity, GDP vs GDI.

groups.title: Consumer
groups.blurb: Retail sales, income & spending, sentiment & confidence.

groups.title: Rates
groups.blurb: Treasury yields, the curve, credit spreads, equities, commodities.

groups.title: Industry
groups.blurb: Industrial production, factory orders, ISM PMIs.

groups.title: Gov't
groups.blurb: Federal debt, fiscal flows, money supply, the Fed balance sheet.
